title: Invalid Auth Token in Subworkflow Execution
symptom: The subworkflow fails with a 401 error indicating an invalidated auth token when attempting to use a JWT passed from the parent workflow.
applies_when: Using AI Agent node with a subworkflow
JWT is passed from parent to subworkflow
not_this_if: JWT is correctly formatted and valid
root_cause: The JWT being passed from the parent workflow to the subworkflow is malformed or truncated, leading to authentication failures when the subworkflow attempts to use it. This can happen due to how n8n handles variable passing between workflows.
fix_steps: Open the Tool node settings in the main workflow.
Click on 'Refresh Workflow input List' to update the input parameters.
Save the workflow and re-execute the parent workflow.
agent_instruction: Refresh the workflow input list in the Tool node settings to ensure the JWT is correctly passed.
